zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James de  Schaw Knight於1374年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴可萊德格林可時，他的父親Sir Alexander de la Schaw25歲，母親Janet Galbraith Crawford24歲。他於1398年與Mary De Annandio在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1444年在蘇格蘭享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾吉爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James de  Schaw Knight于1374年出生在英国苏格兰音巴可萊德格林可时，他的父亲Sir Alexander de la Schaw25岁，母亲Janet Galbraith Crawford24岁。他于1398年与Mary De Annandio在英国苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1444年在苏格兰享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾吉爾斯。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James de  Schaw Knight was born in 1374, in Greenock, Inverclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, was 25 and his mother, Janet Galbraith Crawford, was 24. He married Mary De Annandio in 1398, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1444, in Scotland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James de  Schaw Knight est né en 1374, à Greenock, Inverclyde, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Janet Galbraith Crawford, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary De Annandio en 1398, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1444, à Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James de  Schaw Knight 1374 in Greenock, Inverclyde, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander de la Schaw 25 und seine Mutter Janet Galbraith Crawford 24. Er hat 1398 in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary De Annandio geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1444 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James de  Schaw Knight è nato il nel 1374 nel Greenock, Inverclyde, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Janet Galbraith Crawford, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mary De Annandio nel 1398, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1444, nel Scotland, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James de  Schaw Knightが1374年にイギリススコットランドインバークリドグレエノックで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander de la Schawは25歳，母Janet Galbraith Crawfordは24歳であった。1398年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでMary De Annandioと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1444年にスコットランドで70歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアキルシスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James de  Schaw Knight(이)가 1374년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버c리드 그린옥크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander de la Schaw(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Galbraith Crawford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1398년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 Mary De Annandio(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1444년 스컷랜드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 킬시스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James de  Schaw Knight nasceu em 1374, em Greenock, Inverclyde, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Janet Galbraith Crawford, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary De Annandio em 1398, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1444, em Scotland, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James de  Schaw Knight родился в 1374 г. в местности гринокк, инвирклид, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander de la Schaw было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Galbraith Crawford, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary De Annandio в 1398 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1444 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности килсит, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James de  Schaw Knight nació en 1374, en Greenock, Inverclyde, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander de la Schaw, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Janet Galbraith Crawford, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mary De Annandio en 1398, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1444, en Scotland, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
